description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.1 Docker image and defines a before_script that runs `apt-get update -qy`, `apt-get install -y nodejs`, and `bundle install --without development --path vendor`. Enable a cache for the `vendor/` directory. Define two stages, test and deploy: add a `test` job in the test stage that executes `bundle exec middleman build` and runs on all branches except `master`; add a `pages` job in the deploy stage that also runs `bundle exec middleman build`, publishes the `public/` directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and only runs on the `master` branch.
